traits.locale_text: Eo-gann deals increased Energy and Shock damage equal to total increased Shock damage taken from {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g}

languages.text: For each stack of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g}, the energy and {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} dealt by Eogunn is increased by an amount equal to the increased shock {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} he suffers from this effect after applying all modifiers.
languages.original_text: Eo-gann deals increased Energy and Shock damage equal to total increased Shock damage taken from {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g}

traits.locale_text: For each stack of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g}, the energy and shock damage dealt by Eogunn is increased by a value equal to how much this effect increases the shock damage he suffers after applying all modifiers.

For each stack of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g}, the energy and {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} dealt by Eogunn is increased by an amount equal to the increased shock {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} he suffers from this effect after applying all modifiers.

For each stack of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g}, the energy and {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} dealt by Eogunn is increased by an amount equal to the increased shock damage he suffers from this effect after applying all modifiers.

For each stack of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g}, the energy and {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} dealt by Eogunn is increased by an amount equal to the increased shock {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} he suffers from this effect after applying all modifiers.

languages.text: За каждый уровень эффекта {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}священное железо{/g} энергетический и {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрический урон{/g}, наносимый Эоганном, увеличивается на величину, равную увеличенному электрическому {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урону{/g}, который он получает от этого эффекта после применения всех модификаторов.
languages.original_text: For each stack of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g}, the energy and {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} dealt by Eogunn is increased by an amount equal to the increased shock {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} he suffers from this effect after applying all modifiers.

traits.locale_text: За каждый уровень эффекта {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}священное железо{/g} энергетический и {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрический урон{/g}, наносимый Эоганном, увеличивается на величину, равную увеличенному электрическому {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урону{/g}, который он получает от этого эффекта после применения всех модификаторов.

За каждый уровень эффекта {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}священное железо{/g} энергетический и {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрический урон{/g}, наносимый Эоганном, увеличивается на величину, равную увеличенному электрическому {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урону{/g}, который он получает от этого эффекта после применения всех модификаторов.

languages.text: Por cada acumulación de {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g}, el {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}daño de conmoción{/g} y energía infligido por Eogunn aumenta en una cantidad igual al {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}daño{/g} de conmoción incrementado que sufra a causa de este efecto (después de aplicar los modificadores pertinentes).
languages.original_text: For each stack of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g}, the energy and {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} dealt by Eogunn is increased by an amount equal to the increased shock {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} he suffers from this effect after applying all modifiers.

traits.locale_text: Por cada acumulación de {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g}, el {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}daño de conmoción{/g} y energía infligido por Eogunn aumenta en una cantidad igual al {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}daño{/g} de conmoción incrementado que sufra a causa de este efecto (después de aplicar los modificadores pertinentes).

languages.text: Für jeden Stapel {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum sanctum{/g} erhöht sich der von Eogunn verursachte Energie- und {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}Schockschaden{/g} um einen Wert in Höhe des erhöhten Schock{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}schadens{/g}, den er durch diesen Effekt nach dem Einsatz aller Modifikatoren erleidet.
languages.original_text: For each stack of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g}, the energy and {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} dealt by Eogunn is increased by an amount equal to the increased shock {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} he suffers from this effect after applying all modifiers.

traits.locale_text: Für jeden Stapel {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum sanctum{/g} erhöht sich der von Eogunn verursachte Energie- und {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}Schockschaden{/g} um einen Wert in Höhe des erhöhten Schock{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}schadens{/g}, den er durch diesen Effekt nach dem Einsatz aller Modifikatoren erleidet.

languages.text: Her bir {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}demir kutak{/g} birikimi için Eogunn'un verdiği enerji ve {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}şok hasarı{/g}, tüm değiştiriciler uygulandıktan sonra bu etkiden aldığı artan şok {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}hasarı{/g} kadar artar.
languages.original_text: For each stack of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g}, the energy and {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} dealt by Eogunn is increased by an amount equal to the increased shock {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} he suffers from this effect after applying all modifiers.

traits.locale_text: Her bir {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}demir kutak{/g} birikimi için Eogunn'un verdiği enerji ve {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}şok hasarı{/g}, tüm değiştiriciler uygulandıktan sonra bu etkiden aldığı artan şok {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}hasarı{/g} kadar artar.

languages.text: Pour chaque cumul de {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g}, les dégâts d'énergie et d'{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}électrocution{/g} infligés par Eogunn augmentent d'un montant égal aux {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} d'électrocution supplémentaires qu'il subit de cet effet après application de tous les modificateurs.
languages.original_text: For each stack of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g}, the energy and {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} dealt by Eogunn is increased by an amount equal to the increased shock {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} he suffers from this effect after applying all modifiers.

traits.locale_text: Pour chaque cumul de {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g}, les dégâts d'énergie et d'{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}électrocution{/g} infligés par Eogunn augmentent d'un montant égal aux {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} d'électrocution supplémentaires qu'il subit de cet effet après application de tous les modificateurs.

languages.text: {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}钢铁圣所{/g}每叠加一层，伊奥贡造成的能量和{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}电击伤害{/g}增加，增加量等同于结算所有修正后，他因此效果多承受的电击{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}伤害{/g}。
languages.original_text: For each stack of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g}, the energy and {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} dealt by Eogunn is increased by an amount equal to the increased shock {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} he suffers from this effect after applying all modifiers.

traits.locale_text: {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}钢铁圣所{/g}每叠加一层，伊奥贡造成的能量和{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}电击伤害{/g}增加，增加量等同于结算所有修正后，他因此效果多承受的电击{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}伤害{/g}。

languages.text: {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}フェルム・サンクトゥム{/g}のスタックごとに、エオガンが与えるエネルギーおよび{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}ショックダメージ{/g}が、すべての修正値を適用した後にこの効果によって彼が受ける増加分のショック{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}ダメージ{/g}と等しい量だけ増加する。
languages.original_text: For each stack of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g}, the energy and {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} dealt by Eogunn is increased by an amount equal to the increased shock {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} he suffers from this effect after applying all modifiers.

traits.locale_text: {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}フェルム・サンクトゥム{/g}のスタックごとに、エオガンが与えるエネルギーおよび{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}ショックダメージ{/g}が、すべての修正値を適用した後にこの効果によって彼が受ける増加分のショック{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}ダメージ{/g}と等しい量だけ増加する。
